title: Intense Spicy Chinese Tofu Skewers
description: A satvik-friendly, spicy, and romantic Chinese dish featuring caster sugar and agemono-deep-fry, perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Preheat the raclette-grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, ginger paste, garlic paste, szechuan pepper, and red pepper flakes.
Add the tofu cubes to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated tofu cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Sprinkle the caster sugar over the tofu cubes.
Place the skewers on the preheated raclette-grill and cook for 10-12 minutes, or until the tofu is golden brown and crispy.
Brush the skewers with the remaining marinade during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
Remove the skewers from the grill and garnish with chopped scallions.
